name: Claude Terminal
postCreateCommand: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@latest && pip install fastapi uvicorn[standard] websockets pydantic
postStartCommand: cd /workspaces/claude-terminal && nohup python -m uvicorn backend.server:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --ws-ping-interval 30 --ws-ping-timeout 10 > /tmp/claude-terminal.log 2>&1 & sleep 2 && echo 'Claude Terminal running on port 8080'
